mapper.update: UPDATE exam_import_job SET storage_path = #{storagePath}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_import_job WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_import_job ( job_name, bank_name, source_mode, storage_path, status, uploaded_file_count, progress_message, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{jobName}, #{bankName}, #{sourceMode}, NULL, 'pending', #{uploadedFileCount}, #{progressMessage}, '1' )
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_import_job SET status = 'running', start_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_paper ( exam_bank_id, paper_code, paper_name, module_name, subject_type, book_code, test_no, status, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{examBankId}, #{paperCode}, #{paperName}, #{moduleName}, #{subjectType}, #{bookCode}, #{testNo}, 1, '1' )

INSERT INTO exam_section ( exam_paper_id, section_id, section_no, section_title, content_html, content_text, instructions_html, instructions_text, sort_order, source_file, status, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{examPaperId}, #{sectionId}, #{sectionNo}, #{sectionTitle}, #{contentHtml}, #{contentText}, #{instructionsHtml}, #{instructionsText}, #{sortOrder}, #{sourceFile}, 1, '1' )

INSERT INTO exam_group ( exam_section_id, group_id, group_title, raw_type, stat_type, instructions_html, instructions_text, content_html, content_text, has_shared_options, has_blanks, structure_json, sort_order, status, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{examSectionId}, #{groupId}, #{groupTitle}, #{rawType}, #{statType}, #{instructionsHtml}, #{instructionsText}, #{contentHtml}, #{contentText}, #{hasSharedOptions}, #{hasBlanks}, #{structureJson}, #{sortOrder}, 1, '1' )

INSERT INTO exam_question ( exam_group_id, question_id, question_code, question_no, raw_type, stat_type, stem_html, stem_text, content_html, content_text, source_blank_id, sort_order, score, status, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{examGroupId}, #{questionId}, #{questionCode}, #{questionNo}, #{rawType}, #{statType}, #{stemHtml}, #{stemText}, #{contentHtml}, #{contentText}, #{sourceBlankId}, #{sortOrder}, #{score}, 1, '1' )

INSERT INTO exam_asset ( exam_section_id, exam_group_id, exam_question_id, owner_type, asset_type, asset_role, asset_name, source_path, storage_path, asset_url, sort_order, status, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{examSectionId}, #{examGroupId}, #{examQuestionId}, #{ownerType}, #{assetType}, #{assetRole}, #{assetName}, #{sourcePath}, #{storagePath}, #{assetUrl}, #{sortOrder}, 1, '1' )
mapper.select: SELECT exam_bank_id, subject_scope FROM exam_bank WHERE bank_code = #{bankCode} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_bank SET bank_name = #{bankName}, subject_scope = #{subjectScope}, source_name = #{sourceName}, status = 1, delete_flag = '1', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_bank_id = #{bankId}
mapper.select:
SELECT paper_code FROM exam_paper WHERE delete_flag = '1' AND paper_code IN
#{paperCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_import_job SET resolved_file_count = #{resolvedFileCount}, manifest_count = #{manifestCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, imported_bank_count = #{importedBankCount}, imported_paper_count = #{importedPaperCount}, imported_section_count = #{importedSectionCount}, imported_group_count = #{importedGroupCount}, imported_question_count = #{importedQuestionCount}, imported_answer_count = #{importedAnswerCount}, imported_blank_count = #{importedBlankCount}, imported_option_count = #{importedOptionCount}, imported_asset_count = #{importedAssetCount}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, result_json = #{resultJson}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId}

UPDATE exam_import_job SET status = 'completed', resolved_file_count = #{resolvedFileCount}, manifest_count = #{manifestCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, imported_bank_count = #{importedBankCount}, imported_paper_count = #{importedPaperCount}, imported_section_count = #{importedSectionCount}, imported_group_count = #{importedGroupCount}, imported_question_count = #{importedQuestionCount}, imported_answer_count = #{importedAnswerCount}, imported_blank_count = #{importedBlankCount}, imported_option_count = #{importedOptionCount}, imported_asset_count = #{importedAssetCount}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, result_json = #{resultJson}, finish_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId}

UPDATE exam_import_job SET status = 'failed', error_message = #{errorMessage}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, finish_time = COALESCE(finish_time, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId}
